hero.title: DeepSeek首轮融资500亿元：腾讯宁德时代参投，估值达4000亿元创国产AI纪录
hero.title_en: DeepSeek Raises 50B RMB in First Funding Round: Tencent & CATL Join at 400B RMB Valuation
hero.summary: 中国AI独角兽DeepSeek启动首轮融资，拟筹集500亿元人民币，腾讯、宁德时代等巨头参投，创始人个人出资200亿。投后估值达3500-4000亿元，标志着中国AI基础设施自主化进入新阶段。该轮融资将整合能源与科技资源，巩固DeepSeek在中国AI战略中的核心地位。
hero.summary_en: Chinese AI unicorn DeepSeek launches its first funding round, seeking 50 billion RMB with Tencent, CATL, and other giants participating. The founder personally contributes 20 billion RMB. Post-money valuation reaches 350-400 billion RMB, marking a new era for China's AI infrastructure autonomy.

articles.title: Anthropic发布Claude Opus 4.8：代码缺陷降低75%，速度提升2.5倍
articles.title_en: Anthropic Releases Claude Opus 4.8: Code Defects Down 75%, Speed Up 2.5x
articles.summary: Anthropic发布旗舰模型升级版Claude Opus 4.8，聚焦智能体编程与多领域推理。在多项核心基准测试中超越GPT-5.5，AI幻觉现象大幅减少，编程缺陷率下降75%，判断力显著提升，标志着AI代码可靠性的重大突破。
articles.summary_en: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.8, focusing on agentic coding and multi-domain reasoning. It surpasses GPT-5.5 in multiple core benchmarks, significantly reduces AI hallucinations, cuts code defect rate by 75%, and marks a major breakthrough in AI code reliability.

articles.title: 特朗普签署AI行政令：前沿模型发布前需自愿接受30天政府审查
articles.title_en: Trump Signs AI Executive Order: Frontier Models Face Voluntary 30-Day Government Review
articles.summary: 美国总统特朗普签署行政令，要求AI公司在发布新模型前自愿接受政府最长30天审查，同时建立AI网络安全信息中心。该令从原版90天审查期缩短至30天，反映了监管派与加速派之间的激烈博弈。
articles.summary_en: President Trump signs an executive order requiring AI companies to voluntarily submit new models for up to 30 days of government review before release, while establishing an AI cybersecurity information center. The review period was shortened from the original 90 days.

articles.title: OpenAI CEO Altman游说国会：反对AI模型审批制度，呼吁增加测试资金
articles.title_en: OpenAI CEO Altman Lobbies Congress: Opposes AI Model Approval Requirements, Urges More Testing Funds
articles.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman本周访问华盛顿，将要求国会增加商务部AI测试资金，同时反对要求AI开发商在发布新模型前获得政府批准的提案。此举正值OpenAI准备秘密提交IPO申请之际。
articles.summary_en: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman visits Washington this week to ask Congress for increased AI testing funding at the Commerce Department, while opposing proposals requiring government approval before releasing new AI models. This comes as OpenAI prepares to confidentially file for IPO.

articles.title: 欧盟发布"技术主权"一揽子方案：云AI法案+芯片法案2.0
articles.title_en: EU Launches "Technological Sovereignty" Package: Cloud AI Act + Chips Act 2.0
articles.summary: 欧盟委员会公布"欧洲技术主权一揽子方案"，包括《云与人工智能发展法案》和《芯片法案2.0》两项立法提案，目标5至7年内将欧洲数据中心容量提高3倍，建设尖端半导体能力。同时发布开源战略和能源数字化AI路线图。
articles.summary_en: The European Commission unveils the "European Technological Sovereignty Package," including the Cloud & AI Development Act and Chips Act 2.0, aiming to triple EU data center capacity within 5-7 years and build cutting-edge semiconductor capabilities.

articles.title: 谷歌推出Dreambeans：AI个性化故事应用，整合Gmail/日历/照片数据
articles.title_en: Google Launches Dreambeans: AI Personalized Story App Integrating Gmail/Calendar/Photos
articles.summary: 谷歌实验室推出实验性应用Dreambeans，利用AI整合Gmail、日历、照片等多产品数据，每日生成个性化故事内容。基于Personal Intelligence和Nano Banana 2模型，目前仅面向美国AI Ultra订阅用户开放。
articles.summary_en: Google Labs launches Dreambeans, an experimental app using AI to integrate data from Gmail, Calendar, Photos and more to generate personalized daily stories. Based on Personal Intelligence and Nano Banana 2 models, currently available only to US AI Ultra subscribers.

articles.title: 千寻智能再获15亿元A+轮融资：四个月四轮近50亿，刷新具身智能融资纪录
articles.title_en: Qianxun Intelligence Raises 1.5B RMB in A+ Round: 4 Rounds in 4 Months, Setting Embodied AI Fundraising Record
articles.summary: 千寻智能宣布完成15亿元A+轮融资，股东包括一线美元基金、大型产业投资方及国资基金。短短三个月完成四轮密集融资，累计近50亿元，刷新具身智能赛道融资频次纪录，加速基座模型迭代与商业化落地。
articles.summary_en: Qianxun Intelligence announces 1.5 billion RMB A+ round from top-tier USD funds, industrial investors, and state capital. Four rounds in three months totaling nearly 5 billion RMB set a frequency record in the embodied AI sector.

articles.title: 阶跃Step 3.7 Flash登OpenRouter全球第二：Agent时代Flash模型新标杆
articles.title_en: Step 3.7 Flash Ranks #2 on OpenRouter Globally: New Benchmark for Agent-Era Flash Models
articles.summary: 阶跃星辰最新开源基座模型Step 3.7 Flash发布2天后登上OpenRouter Trending全球第二。该模型面向Agent生产化阶段，围绕Agent、编程、搜索与多模态工作流进行系统优化，采用Apache 2.0协议开源。
articles.summary_en: StepFun's latest open-source model Step 3.7 Flash reaches #2 on OpenRouter Trending within 2 days of release. Optimized for agent production, coding, search, and multimodal workflows, released under Apache 2.0 license.

articles.title: 千问向第三方Agent和Skill全面开放：瑞幸、肯德基首批接入
articles.title_en: Qianwen Opens to Third-Party Agents & Skills: Luckin Coffee, KFC Among First Partners
articles.summary: 千问宣布向第三方Agent和Skill全面开放，所有企业均可接入Skill。瑞幸咖啡、肯德基、东方航空等首批企业已提供Skill服务，未来企业可在千问运营自有品牌Agent，以对话形式为用户提供产品服务。
articles.summary_en: Qianwen announces full opening to third-party Agents and Skills. Luckin Coffee, KFC, and China Eastern Airlines are among the first enterprises providing Skill services. Companies can operate branded Agents on Qianwen in the future.

articles.title: 豆包推出专业版：免费功能保持不变，增值服务开启商业化分层
articles.title_en: Doubao Launches Pro Version: Free Features Remain, Paid Tier Starts Commercial Segmentation
articles.summary: 豆包发布专业版说明，将针对专业人群推出软件开发、数据分析、专业设计等服务。广大用户日常使用的搜索问答、写作生图、语音视频对话等功能保持免费。专业版在一定额度内也可免费使用，行业告别全品类无限免费阶段。
articles.summary_en: Doubao announces Pro version for professionals with software development, data analysis, and design services. Free features including search, writing, image generation, and voice/video chat remain unchanged. The industry moves past the unlimited-free era.

articles.title: 香港发布HKGAI V3大模型：推动"Token出海"，服务海外政商客户
articles.title_en: Hong Kong Releases HKGAI V3: Pushing "Token Export" to Serve Overseas Government & Business Clients
articles.summary: 香港生成式AI研发中心发布HKGAI V3大模型，Token压缩效率提升超10倍，智能体无干预运行时长增加近百倍。同步推出Agent Workshop超级智能体，将优先落地香港特区政府系统，并推动"Token出海"服务海外政商客户。
articles.summary_en: HKGAI releases V3 model with 10x token compression efficiency and 100x longer autonomous agent runtime. Agent Workshop, Hong Kong's first production-grade super agent, will debut in the HKSAR government system before expanding overseas.
